headline: Edison International (EIX) Faces 11,700 Eaton Fire Claims As Recovery Program Stays Open
summary: Southern California Edison's Wildfire Recovery Compensation Program tied to the Eaton Fire has attracted over 11,700 claimants so far. The program remains open for new applicants, indicating continued community engagement and ongoing claims activity. This compensation effort is a material development for Edison International (NYSE:EIX) given its scale, claimant participation, and focus on wildfire related liabilities. Edison International sits at the center of a closely watched utility...
